command_results.command:
set -e

echo "=== run1: probe base train ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py   --adapter-json analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_train_dataset.json   --checkpoint "checkpoints/15x15_current_best_margin_g2m13_m15_3pair_b.pt"   --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_before.csv"   --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_before.md"   --channels 64   --blocks 4

echo "=== run1: probe base eval ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py   --adapter-json analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_eval_dataset.json   --checkpoint "checkpoints/15x15_current_best_margin_g2m13_m15_3pair_b.pt"   --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/eval_before.csv"   --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/eval_before.md"   --channels 64   --blocks 4

echo "=== run1: tiny training ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/train_teacher_divergence_policy_mixed_ce_anchor_probe.py   --dataset "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_plain_dataset.json"   --base-checkpoint "checkpoints/15x15_current_best_margin_g2m13_m15_3pair_b.pt"   --out-checkpoint "checkpoints/probes/retention_family_wrapper_run1_candidate.pt"   --eval-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_script_eval.csv"   --report "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_script_report.md"   --epochs 1   --lr 1e-5   --kl-weight 1.0   --anchor-kl-splits train_candidate   --train-scope policy_head   --channels 64   --blocks 4   --device cpu   --no-strict-splits

echo "=== run1: probe candidate train ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py   --adapter-json analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_train_dataset.json   --checkpoint "checkpoints/probes/retention_family_wrapper_run1_candidate.pt"   --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_after.csv"   --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/train_after.md"   --channels 64   --blocks 4

echo "=== run1: probe candidate eval ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py   --adapter-json analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_eval_dataset.json   --checkpoint "checkpoints/probes/retention_family_wrapper_run1_candidate.pt"   --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/eval_after.csv"   --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_wrapper_run1/eval_after.md"   --channels 64   --blocks 4
command_results.label: train

critical_eval_rows.materialized_reason: stable top1 gain gate, but not valid as the only sibling-family heldout check

critical_train_rows.materialized_reason: repeated heldout blocker; regression signal; sibling target conflict family; mixed signal family
